name: Lakeview Golf Club
about: Lakeview Golf Club is an outstanding 27-hole golf facility just east of Harrisonburg, VA. Each of its 9-hole courses—Lake, Peak, and Mountain—offers varied characteristics that create a fun, fair, playable, and challenging experience for all skill levels. The venue features a service-friendly atmosphere and professional staff, along with an outstanding practice complex designed for long game, short game, and putting practice. For simulator play, Lakeview offers HD Golf technology, providing a comprehensive golf experience with both on-course and indoor options. The club is located conveniently just a few miles off I-81 at exits 245 & 247.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium HD Golf simulator technology for indoor play
Professional instruction available with multiple PGA-certified coaches
27-hole championship course with varied course layouts for all skill levels
Full-service Legends Bar and Grill offering food and drinks
Dedicated junior programs and camps for youth golfers
Convenient location near I-81 with easy access

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant available at Legends Bar and Grill
Bar service available at Legends Bar and Grill

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available through the pro shop, though bringing your own clubs is recommended for the best fitting experience.

faq.question: Can I bring outside food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The Legends Bar and Grill offers a full menu and bar service for patrons.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on the simulator takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Lakeview offers extensive junior golf programs, camps, and youth events, making it very family-friendly.
